response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrates craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), plus high-scale exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests/second. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, A/B testing frameworks, or growth/measurement infrastructure — the core of this Principal IC6 role. Title progression also tops out at Staff/Senior rather than Principal, and there is no evidence of cross-team platform leadership at the scale this role requires.
strengths: 13+ years engineering breadth across TS/Node, C/C++, Java, DLang with low-latency high-throughput experience
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, teaching workshops and courses
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work aligns with AI-first engineering velocity preference
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems
Lacks telemetry/metrics platform and statistical analysis track record central to the role
No evidence of Principal-level cross-team platform leadership influencing multiple product teams

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and language breadth
Seniority gap — Staff/Senior vs Principal IC6 scope
